name: Cheddar Fruit Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugars together until light and fluffy.
2. Stir in the egg and vanilla extract.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients (flour and salt) to the wet mixture and blend well.
4. Mix in the shredded cheddar cheese, crushed pineapple, and chopped cherries.
5. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 375°F for 15 minutes.
